ageMaturityLayer.biologicalMaturationProfile: post-reproductive-peak; body carries labor history as knowledge; seasonal illness and recovery memory shapes risk tolerance
ageMaturityLayer.emotionalMaturityProfile: grief-integrated; processes loss as structural data rather than fresh wound; emotional restraint is practiced discipline
ageMaturityLayer.socialRoleMaturity: decision-bearing elder-adjacent; expected to mediate between elder counsel and younger action; carries household-scale authority
ageMaturityLayer.selfAwarenessLevel: high but blind to own rigidity; accurately reads others but underestimates how own fear narrows options

intimacyEmbodimentLayer.bodyAwarenessStyle: functional-instrumental; body is labor tool and social signal rather than site of private sensation
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.attractionAwarenessStyle: alliance-filtered; attraction registers as kinship-strategic compatibility before physical pull
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.boundaryUnderstanding: spatial-relational; boundaries are communal architecture not personal preference
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.consentAgencyUnderstanding: obligation-embedded; consent operates through kinship negotiation and elder approval
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.reproductiveAwareness: practical-lineage; reproduction understood as continuity engineering
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.intimacyKnowledgeSource: elder instruction, observed marriages, seasonal ceremony, co-sleeping proximity, birth-witness experience
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.embodimentStyle: task-anchored; sensory experience flows through handled objects, weather exposure, and witnessed labor
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.intimacyRiskPerception: structural; intimacy risk is lineage risk

historicalCulturalMediation.ritualStatus: full-participant; has completed all age-appropriate ceremonies; carries ritual knowledge as working law
historicalCulturalMediation.maritalStatus: partnered-or-widowed; marital bond is political-economic alliance with affective dimension
historicalCulturalMediation.kinshipObligationPressure: high; must balance competing lineage claims and cross-household alliances
historicalCulturalMediation.communityCourtshipNorms: elder-mediated; courtship involves household negotiation, gift exchange protocols, and seasonal timing
historicalCulturalMediation.spiritualMeaningOfUnion: cosmological; union carries spiritual reciprocity obligations; fertility and partnership linked to land health
historicalCulturalMediation.publicVsPrivateIntimacyCode: public-dominant; intimate partnership visible through labor cooperation, seating order, and ceremonial position

voiceCognitionModifiers: interior monologue may reference partner through object association rather than direct naming
body awareness filtered through labor history; physical sensation named through task vocabulary
attraction or affection expressed as assessment of reliability and lineage fit
perspectiveRoutingModifiers: intimacy scenes routed through spatial awareness and social reading rather than interiority zoom
private feeling expressed through withholding and gesture change, never declarative emotional labeling
renderDirectiveModifiers: abstractionCeiling: 0 for any intimacy content; all closeness must land through object, body, and spatial cue
silenceWithholdingRequirement: true for any scene where partnership tension operates
imagePermission: high for domestic labor scenes that encode partnership; low for explicit interiority about desire
characterConsoleModifiers: registers partner presence through peripheral awareness: position at fire, sound of their movement, absence from expected location
sexual or romantic energy converts to duty-assessment and lineage-continuity pressure before surfacing as feeling
bodilyConversionPatterns: desire converts to increased attentiveness to partner's spatial position and task pace
grief over partnership loss converts to silence and over-precision in household tasks
intimacy pressure converts to hand stillness and breath regulation before speech
silencePatterns: silence after partner speaks carries evaluative weight; duration encodes trust level
silence about absent partner marks active grief or unresolved obligation
intimacyDistancePatterns: physical proximity increases during shared labor, decreases during council tension
narrative distance pulls back from embodied to observational when partnership is under communal scrutiny

ageMaturityLayer.biologicalMaturationProfile: physical prime; body optimized for labor and travel; still learning to read fatigue as signal rather than weakness
ageMaturityLayer.emotionalMaturityProfile: partially integrated; processes threat faster than grief; emotional range narrowed by role pressure to perform competence
ageMaturityLayer.socialRoleMaturity: ascending but unconfirmed; earns authority through demonstrated judgment rather than inherited position; tested by elders through delegation
ageMaturityLayer.selfAwarenessLevel: low-to-moderate; reads external signals with precision but misattributes own emotional states as strategic thinking

intimacyEmbodimentLayer.bodyAwarenessStyle: performance-oriented; body understood through capacity and endurance; notices body when it fails or exceeds expectation
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.attractionAwarenessStyle: status-filtered; attraction registers through demonstrated competence and household standing
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.boundaryUnderstanding: spatial-relational; boundaries are communal architecture not personal preference
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.consentAgencyUnderstanding: emerging; personal choice operates within but does not override kinship structure
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.reproductiveAwareness: practical-lineage; reproduction understood as continuity engineering
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.intimacyKnowledgeSource: elder instruction, observed marriages, seasonal ceremony, co-sleeping proximity, birth-witness experience
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.embodimentStyle: action-first; sensory experience registered through movement, distance, and physical consequence
intimacyEmbodimentLayer.intimacyRiskPerception: reputational; wrong intimacy choice threatens ascending authority

historicalCulturalMediation.ritualStatus: recently-confirmed; has completed threshold ceremonies but has not yet led ceremony
historicalCulturalMediation.maritalStatus: pre-marital-or-early-union; partnership under active household negotiation
historicalCulturalMediation.kinshipObligationPressure: very high; must prove worthy of the lineage position being offered
historicalCulturalMediation.communityCourtshipNorms: constrained-initiative; may signal interest but cannot finalize without elder approval
historicalCulturalMediation.spiritualMeaningOfUnion: aspirational; understands union as spiritual-political event but has not yet internalized the cosmological weight
historicalCulturalMediation.publicVsPrivateIntimacyCode: public-performance-heavy; intimate interest must be legible to community as appropriate before private exploration

voiceCognitionModifiers: interior monologue about potential partner filtered through competence-assessment vocabulary
body awareness spikes during status-relevant encounters; physical sensation named through action vocabulary
attraction surfaced through heightened observational precision about the other person's movements
perspectiveRoutingModifiers: intimacy-adjacent scenes routed through external observation and social-reading mode
narrative distance increases when conscious of being watched during partnership-relevant interaction
renderDirectiveModifiers: abstractionCeiling: 0 for any intimacy content; all closeness must land through object, body, and spatial cue
sentencePressure: compressed during attraction-awareness moments; short clauses mimic elevated alertness
imagePermission: medium for status-display encounters; low for private feeling
characterConsoleModifiers: registers potential-partner presence through heightened alertness to their spatial behavior and speech timing
desire converts to competitive assessment before surfacing as interest; interest converts to strategic positioning
bodilyConversionPatterns: attraction converts to postural adjustment: shoulders squared, chin-angle recalibrated, grip tightened
rejection or uncertainty converts to over-investment in visible labor
intimacy curiosity converts to observational hyper-focus on the other person's micro-behaviors
silencePatterns: silence in the presence of a potential partner signals active processing disguised as indifference
silence after elder commentary on partnership suitability encodes deferred compliance or private resistance
intimacyDistancePatterns: proximity to potential partner managed through task adjacency: chooses work stations that enable observation
narrative distance oscillates between embodied and observational when attraction is active

expressMaturityThrough: misreading patterns specific to developmental stage
globalRenderingRules.chronologyProtection: No developmental-intimacy content may introduce dates, events, or knowledge beyond the Before-1680 chronological envelope
globalRenderingRules.canonProtection: Developmental-intimacy modeling may not resolve succession, identity, or partnership outcomes that must remain latent for future chapters

ageAppropriateHandling.childCharacters: HARD PROTECTION: Child characters never process, witness directly, or participate in intimate content. Partnership dynamics render as unexplained environmental patterns only.
ageAppropriateHandling.thresholdCharacters: Intimacy awareness arrives as unnamed body disruption and social-mirror feedback. Never named, categorized, or theorized.
ageAppropriateHandling.adultCharacters: Intimacy awareness processed through task vocabulary, spatial awareness, and lineage-strategic assessment. Never rendered as modern psychological interiority.
ageAppropriateHandling.elderCharacters: Intimacy processed through memorial comparison and instructional authority. Present desire does not surface; all intimate awareness is retrospective or evaluative.

globalRenderingRules.noExplicitSexualityFlattening: Do not render sexuality or desire through modern adult-explicit frameworks. All intimacy content must be mediated through the historical-cultural lens.
globalRenderingRules.intimacyRenderingPrinciple: Intimacy is expressed through what characters notice, what they withhold, how their bodies move in proximity to others, what silences carry, and what labor they choose to share.

activeIntimacyDynamics: Partnership tension expressed through labor coordination and speaking-order negotiation
Developmental gap creates misreading: established authority reads caution as weakness; ascending authority reads restraint as distrust
Elder evaluates household partnership stability through micro-gesture reading
segmentImpactMap.developmentalPhaseInfluenceOnScene: Developmental gap between focal characters creates misreading opportunities that deepen interior distinction.
bodilyConversionActivations: hand-pressure shift before irreversible partnership-relevant decision
postural adjustment when authority is tested in front of witnesses
silence-duration change when partnership topic surfaces indirectly
